source_quote: Responses were obtained for all the women in the LNG-IUS group (53/53, 95% CI 0.93–1.0) and for 96% of the women in the continuous oral group (46/48, 95% CI 0.86–0.99)
reasoning: Binary outcome: complete response. LNG-IUS is intervention (53/53), continuous oral MPA is control (46/48).

source_quote: the quality of recovery was significantly better at postoperative day 2 in patients receiving a profound versus moderate block (179.5 ± 13.6 versus 172.3 ± 19.2)
reasoning: Continuous outcome: quality of recovery score at day 2. Profound NMB vs moderate NMB.
Only percentages given (83% vs 85%), actual event counts not reported.

source_quote: Sinus rhythm was restored 20 h after initiation of therapy in 88 (83%) patients in the amiodarone group and in 24 (44%) patients in the control group (p<0.0001)
reasoning: Binary outcome: sinus rhythm restoration. Amiodarone (88/106) vs GIKM control (24/54).

source_quote: Of the 129 individuals who received vernakalant, 59 (45.7 %) converted to SR compared with one of the 68 patients (1.5 %) who received placebo (p < 0.0001)
reasoning: Binary outcome: conversion to sinus rhythm. Vernakalant (59/129) vs placebo (1/68).
Results only state 'significant differences in FEV1' but do not report actual means, SDs, or mean changes.
Outcome asks for 'change in FEV1', but only absolute FEV1 values at follow-up are reported, not changes from baseline.

source_quote: The percentage of time within intended SpO2 was 58 ± 4% in the Auto-Mixer group and 33.7 ± 4.7% in the manual group
reasoning: Continuous outcome: percentage of time within target SpO2 range. Auto-Mixer vs manual control.
Outcome asks for serious adverse events, but results text focuses on SPPB and SGRQ scores. SAE data not provided in the excerpt.

source_quote: lower transfusion rate (2% vs 34%, P < 0.01) compared with those in the placebo group
reasoning: Binary outcome: need for transfusion. TXA group 2% (1/50) vs placebo 34% (17/50). Study states 100 patients total, 50 per group.
Outcome is blood transfusion, but results text does not report transfusion events or rates. Only blood loss volumes are reported.

source_quote: No symptomatic deep venous thrombosis or other severe complications occurred.
